elearningVideos.title: Making the Syllabus Your Secret Weapon

workflowSteps.title: Client Brief
workflowSteps.description: Received a comprehensive brief for a vast e-learning platform spanning 30+ modules. Analysed scope, audience, and learning objectives to define the creative direction.

workflowSteps.title: Storyboard & Pre-Production
workflowSteps.description: Developed detailed storyboards with sketches, prepared audio mixes, and created character sheets and environment design documents to align the entire team.

workflowSteps.title: Gen AI Asset Generation
workflowSteps.description: Used a robust Gen AI workflow to create production-grade stills, image mixes, and visual assets that could be shaped into consistent motion sequences.

workflowSteps.title: Motion Graphics & Animation
workflowSteps.description: Assembled and animated all assets using the Adobe Suite - After Effects for motion graphics, Illustrator for vector elements, and Photoshop for compositing.

workflowSteps.title: Story Assembly
workflowSteps.description: Assembled all elements based on the story plot with deliberate creative decisions - pacing, transitions, visual hierarchy, and narrative flow were all carefully considered.

workflowSteps.title: Sound Design & SFX
workflowSteps.description: Added a comprehensive layer of SFX with detailed sound design in Premiere Pro - ambient audio, motion sound effects, and voice-over sync were all carefully crafted.

workflowSteps.title: QA & Client Delivery
workflowSteps.description: Conducted multiple rounds of quality assurance - reviewing pacing, audio sync, visual consistency, and client feedback loops - before final delivery.

elearningIntro: A complete end-to-end production of an e-learning course ecosystem spanning 30+ modules, built with a robust Gen AI workflow and professional motion graphics production.
promoIntro: High-impact broadcast visuals and promotional campaigns crafted for brands, media networks, and digital channels. From TV-grade motion graphics to social-first promo reels.

caseStudies.label: Case Study 01
caseStudies.title: AI Learning Playbook Intro
caseStudies.problem: The larger course was built as a six-hour learning module, and learners needed a concise intro video that explained the gist, tone, and value of the module before they started.
caseStudies.role: Led the full production pipeline across story understanding, storyboard prep, Gen AI visual development, motion graphics, OST/audio treatment, SFX, final edit, and delivery QA.
caseStudies.process: Read the brief, understood the story, prepared the storyboard and audio, generated and mixed still-image assets, built the motion graphics in After Effects, added OST and SFX, then completed the final edit and QA pass before delivery.
caseStudies.result: Produced a polished promotional intro for a larger AI e-learning course module, designed to orient learners quickly and make the course feel engaging from the first touchpoint.

caseStudies.label: Case Study 02
caseStudies.title: AI Course Promo Module
caseStudies.problem: The course needed an engaging promotional or intro-style video that could preview the learning experience and give learners a clear reason to continue into the full module.
caseStudies.role: Handled the creative execution from brief interpretation and story planning through Gen AI-assisted visuals, After Effects motion graphics, audio prep, edit, SFX, and final QA.
caseStudies.process: Followed a structured workflow: brief review, story understanding, storyboard prep, audio preparation, image and still generation mix, motion graphics, OST treatment, final edit with SFX, and QA before final delivery.
caseStudies.result: Delivered a course intro module that gives learners a fast, polished preview of the six-hour learning experience while keeping the visual system consistent with the broader AI e-learning package.
